name: Sauteed Scallops with Feta
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onion, bell peppers, and sliced jalapeños. Cook until they begin to soften.
3. Add the sea scallops to the skillet and sauté until just set on the outside, about 2-3 minutes per side.
4. Stir in half a cup of white wine and cook for an additional 45 seconds.
5. Sprinkle evenly with mozzarella and feta cheese.
6. Season with pinch of garlic, salt, and chili powder to taste.
7. Cover the skillet and let it simmer until the cheeses have melted completely.
8. Serve over rice. Serves 2.
This recipe is a delightful combination of tender sea scallops, smoky bell peppers, zesty jalapeños, and creamy feta and mozzarella cheeses, all infused with a hint of garlic, salt, and chili powder for a balanced flavor profile.
